steps.title: Spot the contrast word
steps.content: The word “novel” signals the researchers chose a new and different path. This only stands out as novel if existing studies represent what's standard.

steps.title: Match the standard
steps.content:
Conventional directly opposes novel—it's the standard approach against which the researchers' new path stands out.

Eccentric would already be unusual (blurring the contrast), meager addresses irrelevant quantity, and random contradicts the systematic approach described.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
